requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (GSO CISPR 14 series under DGSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（DGSM下的GSO CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（DGSM下的GSO CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Omani market are expected to meet electromagnetic compatibility requirements based on the GSO adoptions of the CISPR 14 series — GSO CISPR 14-1 (emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) and GSO CISPR 14-2 (immunity), which mirror the IEC/CISPR international standards. EMC conformity is assessed within the DGSM conformity scheme administered by MOCIIP. For refrigerators with inverter-driven (variable-speed) compressors, conducted and radiated emission limits and harmonic-current behaviour (CISPR 14-1 / IEC 61000-3-2 family) are the relevant phenomena. Conformity is normally demonstrated via a type-test report (IECEE CB / CISPR basis) accepted by a DGSM-recognised conformity body. Appliances with wireless connectivity must additionally meet TRA radio requirements (see market-access row). Tests should reflect the Omani 240 V, 50 Hz supply, though the 50 Hz frequency matches China.
summary.zh: 投放阿曼市场的家用制冷器具须满足以GSO采纳的CISPR 14系列为基础的电磁兼容要求——GSO CISPR 14-1（家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射要求）和GSO CISPR 14-2（抗扰度），二者对应IEC/CISPR国际标准。电磁兼容符合性在MOCIIP管理的DGSM符合性制度内进行评定。对于装配变频（变速）压缩机的电冰箱，传导与辐射发射限值及谐波电流特性（CISPR 14-1／IEC 61000-3-2系列）为相关现象。符合性通常通过DGSM认可的合格评定机构接受的型式试验报告（IECEE CB／CISPR基础）证明。具无线连接功能的器具须另行满足TRA无线电要求（见市场准入行）。检测应反映阿曼240 V、50 Hz供电，但50 Hz频率与中国一致。
summary.zht: 投放阿曼市場的家用製冷器具須滿足以GSO採納的CISPR 14系列為基礎的電磁相容要求——GSO CISPR 14-1（家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射要求）和GSO CISPR 14-2（抗擾度），二者對應IEC/CISPR國際標準。電磁相容符合性在MOCIIP管理的DGSM符合性制度內進行評定。對於裝配變頻（變速）壓縮機的電冰箱，傳導與輻射發射限值及諧波電流特性（CISPR 14-1／IEC 61000-3-2系列）為相關現象。符合性通常通過DGSM認可的合格評定機構接受的型式試驗報告（IECEE CB／CISPR基礎）證明。具無線連接功能的器具須另行滿足TRA無線電要求（見市場准入行）。檢測應反映阿曼240 V、50 Hz供電，但50 Hz頻率與中國一致。

standards_or_laws: GSO CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-1)
GSO CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (GSO adoption of CISPR 14-2)
GSO IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current up to and including 16 A per phase) — supplementary where applicable
DGSM (MOCIIP) conformity scheme — EMC assessment for regulated electrical products

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These are enforced under the CCC regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China and Oman adopt the CISPR 14 family, the technical content is closely aligned, but a Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test report is not by itself accepted as the conformity basis under the Omani DGSM scheme.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下执行。由于中阿两国均采纳CISPR 14系列，技术内容高度一致，但中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测报告本身不被阿曼DGSM制度接受为符合性依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在SAMR/CNCA管理的CCC制度下執行。由於中阿兩國均採納CISPR 14系列，技術內容高度一致，但中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測報告本身不被阿曼DGSM制度接受為符合性依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions up to and including 16 A per phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because GB 4343.1 and the GSO CISPR 14-1 adoption share the same CISPR 14 lineage, the underlying technical gap is small for most refrigerator types. The remaining gaps are procedural: (1) Conformity route — the Omani DGSM scheme requires the EMC evidence to be presented to a DGSM-recognised body; a CNAS-only GB 4343.1 report typically needs to be re-presented or supplemented as an IECEE CB / CISPR-format report. (2) Inverter compressors — variable-speed inverter refrigerators may generate emissions and harmonic behaviour that older GB 4343.1 test configurations did not fully cover; the manufacturer should confirm the existing test data covers inverter-specific operating modes against the CISPR 14-1 edition referenced by GSO. (3) Wireless models — any Wi-Fi/Bluetooth function moves the appliance into TRA radio scope, which CCC EMC data does not address.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4343.1与GSO CISPR 14-1采纳版同属CISPR 14体系，对大多数电冰箱类型而言底层技术差距很小。剩余差距为程序性：（1）符合性路径——阿曼DGSM制度要求向DGSM认可机构提交电磁兼容证据；仅有CNAS的GB 4343.1报告通常须以IECEE CB／CISPR格式报告重新提交或补充。（2）变频压缩机——变速变频电冰箱可能产生旧版GB 4343.1测试配置未充分涵盖的发射和谐波特性；制造商应确认现有检测数据是否依据GSO引用的CISPR 14-1版本涵盖变频专项工作模式。（3）无线型号——任何Wi-Fi/蓝牙功能使器具进入TRA无线电范围，而CCC电磁兼容数据未涵盖此项。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4343.1與GSO CISPR 14-1採納版同屬CISPR 14體系，對大多數電冰箱類型而言底層技術差距很小。剩餘差距為程序性：（1）符合性路徑——阿曼DGSM制度要求向DGSM認可機構提交電磁相容證據；僅有CNAS的GB 4343.1報告通常須以IECEE CB／CISPR格式報告重新提交或補充。（2）變頻壓縮機——變速變頻電冰箱可能產生舊版GB 4343.1測試配置未充分涵蓋的發射和諧波特性；製造商應確認現有檢測數據是否依據GSO引用的CISPR 14-1版本涵蓋變頻專項工作模式。（3）無線型號——任何Wi-Fi/藍牙功能使器具進入TRA無線電範圍，而CCC電磁相容數據未涵蓋此項。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — EMC conformity to the GSO CISPR 14 series is assessed within the DGSM conformity scheme for regulated household electrical appliances entering Oman
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under the CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC conformity to the GSO CISPR 14 series under the DGSM scheme applies to household refrigerators entering Oman. Chinese GB 4343.1 CCC test data is technically close (shared CISPR 14 lineage) but is not directly accepted as the Omani conformity basis; evidence should be re-presented in IECEE CB / CISPR format to a DGSM-recognised body. Inverter-compressor and wireless models warrant extra verification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据DGSM制度按GSO CISPR 14系列取得电磁兼容符合性，适用于进入阿曼的家用电冰箱。中国GB 4343.1 CCC检测数据技术上接近（同属CISPR 14体系），但不被直接接受为阿曼符合性依据；证据应以IECEE CB／CISPR格式向DGSM认可机构重新提交。变频压缩机及无线型号尤须额外核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據DGSM制度按GSO CISPR 14系列取得電磁相容符合性，適用於進入阿曼的家用電冰箱。中國GB 4343.1 CCC檢測數據技術上接近（同屬CISPR 14體系），但不被直接接受為阿曼符合性依據；證據應以IECEE CB／CISPR格式向DGSM認可機構重新提交。變頻壓縮機及無線型號尤須額外核實。
